title: parasenecio hastatus var. glaber
intro: Parasenecio hastatus var. glaber is a plant species, also known as a type of ragwort, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Parasenecio hastatus var. glaber include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
